Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix IMAGE_VERSION unset in final stage of multi-stage Docker builds (#25907)

In Docker multi-stage builds, ARG declarations are scoped to the build
stage they appear in. All affected Dockerfiles declare ARG image_version
only in the first (builder) stage but not in the final stage. Since
rsync_from_builder_stage() copies only filesystem content (not Docker
ENV metadata), ENV IMAGE_VERSION in the final stage resolves to an
empty string.

This causes container_startup.py to fail with:
  error: argument -v/--version: expected one argument

Fix: Add ARG image_version in the final stage of all 16 affected
Dockerfiles, and add missing ENV IMAGE_VERSION where needed, so the
build-time value is correctly passed through to the runtime image.

Signed-off-by: Storm Liang <stormliang@microsoft.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
chore: configure renovate to restrict go.opentelemetry.io/** updates to minor versions only (#1663)

Recent `go.opentelemetry.io` patch releases have bumped their minimum Go
requirement to 1.25, breaking this project's Go 1.24 support floor.

## Changes

- **`.github/renovate.json`**: Added a `packageRules` entry that
disables `major` and `patch` update types for all
`go.opentelemetry.io/**` packages, leaving only minor version updates
enabled.

```json
{
  "description": "Restrict go.opentelemetry.io/** to minor version updates only",
  "matchPackagePrefixes": ["go.opentelemetry.io/"],
  "matchUpdateTypes": ["major", "patch"],
  "enabled": false
}
```

- Key the lookup by (name, version) instead of just name to handle
  packages that share a name but differ by version.

  unresolved or duplicate entries instead of silently writing empty
  fields.

docs: add dedicated pages for image resizing and quality control (#1661)

`usage.md` was accumulating too much content; image resizing and quality
control warranted their own pages to keep navigation clean.

## New pages

- **Image Resizing** (`weight: 5`) — covers the `MANAEL_ENABLE_RESIZE`
opt-in, `w`/`h`/`fit` query parameters, aspect-ratio behaviour for
partial dimension specs, and security controls
(`MANAEL_MAX_RESIZE_WIDTH`, `MANAEL_MAX_RESIZE_HEIGHT`,
`MANAEL_ALLOWED_WIDTHS`, `MANAEL_ALLOWED_HEIGHTS`)
- **Quality Control** (`weight: 6`) — covers the `q` query parameter
(universal `?q=80` and format-specific `?q=webp:80,avif:50`), clamping
rules, per-format built-in defaults (WebP 90, AVIF 60), and the
`MANAEL_DEFAULT_QUALITY` server-level override with its full resolution
priority order

Both pages are provided in English and Japanese under
`website/content/{en,ja}/docs/`.

commit.message:
Dev script (#6)

* Refactor utilities and add command messages

Add a new command/messages.yml for MiniMessage-formatted command UI text. Refactor various utility classes to modern APIs and simplify logic: use DateTimeFormatter/LocalDateTime in ConfigBackup; replace regex with Guava CaseFormat in NamingUtils; use Guava Primitives/Defaults in TypeConverter and remove custom primitive-wrapper mapping; minor formatting cleanup in TypeConverterUtils. GUI utilities: consolidate bundle handling to use BundleMeta directly, remove reflection-based support checks, and simplify bundle insert/extract logic; use GuiItemUtils.isEmpty throughout ClickActionHandler and DragHandler; streamline GuiItemUtils by using ItemStack.isEmpty and removing redundant helpers; make ItemBuilder.glow use meta.setEnchantmentGlintOverride. MiniMessages.toPlainText now uses Adventure's PlainTextComponentSerializer. Overall changes improve readability, rely on standard/third-party helpers, and remove fragile reflection/code duplication.

* Refactor configuration: adapters, deps & naming

Major refactor of the configuration module:

- Introduce TypeAdapter and TypeSerializer interfaces and update AdapterRegistry to use them.
- Break circular dependencies using lazy Supplier callbacks (DeserializationService, VersionManager, ConfigurationManager) instead of post-construction setters.
- Move FieldMeta into model package and update ConfigurationPart to use ConfigurationCache for field metadata lookups.
- Replace custom NamingUtils with Guava CaseFormat usages for camelCase → kebab-case conversions across the codebase.
- Move @Template processing from ConfigurationLoader into ConfigurationSynchronizer and centralize template handling.
- Update serialization/deserialization to use adapter registry and CaseFormat conversions where appropriate.
- Centralize config backup logging to ConfigurationLogger and switch ConfigurationLogger to use SLF4J (ComponentLogger fallback retained).
- Simplify ConfigurationCache API (method factory → Supplier) and adjust caches; update TypeInference to remove deprecated/unused TypeToken and compatibility caches and simplify cache keys.
- Remove Spark integration and Sensitive annotation usages and update tests to reflect removed features.

Other: various test adjustments and small API cleanups to match the refactor.

* Refactor configuration packages; add plugins & modules

Reorganize the configuration module into clear API/core boundaries: package renames move public interfaces and annotations into gloomlib.configuration.api (and api.annotation/api.exception) and internal implementations/utilities/models into gloomlib.configuration.core.*. Update visibility of several service methods (make package-private/private) and adjust imports across tests. Build changes: register io.papermc.paperweight.userdev plugin, apply it to leaf subprojects, switch from paper.api compileOnly to paperweight.paperDevBundle, and update Paper/paperweight versions in libs.versions.toml. Replace AsyncContext main-thread check to org.bukkit.Bukkit.isPrimaryThread(). Add new modules: diagnostic, math and script with initial sources and related build files; settings.gradle updated accordingly.

* Add diagnostic-rich config errors and line index

Convert SerializationException to a DiagnosticException-backed type with factory methods (typeMismatch, missing, wrap, validation) and rich source snippets. Add LoadContext (ThreadLocal) and YamlLineIndex to capture filename and YAML key line numbers; wire them into ConfigurationLoader so file content is read, cached, and the load context is set during deserialization. Update DeserializationService and ConfigurationSynchronizer to use the new exception factories and propagate validation errors as SerializationException. Add DiagnosticCategory.CONFIG, SourceLocation.ofYamlPath and SourceView.yamlValueSnippet to support readable diagnostic output. Update tests and module dependency (configuration -> diagnostic).

* Refactor configuration & math modules

Move and modernize several utilities and perform API/core cleanup across modules.

Key changes:
- Moved ConfigurationLogger from configuration.core.util to configuration.api.util, made the SLF4J fallback dynamic (adopts plugin logger name) and updated all usages.
- Reworked ConfigurationManager static initialization ordering to avoid startup ordering issues.
- Small fixes and cleanups in configuration code: improved imports, javadoc/formatting tweaks, safer YamlLineIndex exception handling, minor record/reorderring changes in LoadContext and TypeInference, and adjustments to SerializationException formatting.
- Numerous comment/section-divider removals and test tweaks to keep code style consistent across tests.
- Major reorganization and fixes in MathEngine: reordered fields/methods, added batch compile support (BatchResult and BATCH_CACHE), improved literal handling and ASM emission, plus related simplifications and added math tests.
- Added .gitignore entries for /modules/script/src/test and *.gz.

These changes are primarily refactors, stylistic cleanups, and small bug/initialization fixes; no API semantics intended to be changed.

* Delete build_log.txt and temp_analyzer.java

Remove a generated build_log.txt (Gradle build output including Javadoc failure details) and a temporary dev file temp_analyzer.java used to inspect Paper ArgumentTypes. Cleans up repository by removing large log and throwaway analysis code.

* Delete modules/math/src/test/java/gloomlib/test directory

* Delete modules/gui/src/test/java/gloomlib/test directory

* Delete modules/configuration/src/test/java/gloomlib/test directory

* Delete modules/command/src/main/resources directory

* Delete modules/command/src/test/java/gloomlib/command directory

* Delete modules/translation/bin/test/translations directory

* Delete modules/translation/src/test directory

* Fix Folia-compatible isMainThread() and ASMUtils Javadoc typos (#7)

* Initial plan

* fix: restore GlobalRegion thread check in isMainThread() and fix ASMUtils Javadoc typos
